headline: Insulet Taps Mike Panos To Drive Omnipod Commercial Execution And Growth
summary: Insulet (NasdaqGS:PODD) has appointed Mike Panos as Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer. Panos joins the company with three decades of commercial leadership experience at Stryker. The new appointment is aimed at supporting global commercial expansion and execution for Insulet’s insulin delivery business. Insulet focuses on automated insulin delivery systems, a segment that sits at the intersection of medical devices and diabetes care technology. As interest in wearable and...

headline: A Look At Insulet (PODD) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Insulet stock reacts to recent price performance Insulet (PODD) has drawn investor attention after a recent share price slide, including a 20.7% decline over the past year and a 16.3% move lower over the past month. This pullback comes as the company reports annual revenue of US$2.7b and net income of US$247.1m, giving investors fresh data to weigh against the stock's recent performance. See our latest analysis for Insulet. At a share price of US$199.42, Insulet’s recent 30 day share price...
